title.en: The Terran Dignitaries thanked each other.

content.en:
"Kill!"

A giant ape with a height of 10,000 feet conjured up a giant hand and grabbed the Huaxia Continent of the human race, and its power far exceeded that of ordinary Earth Venerables, and it had reached the level of Ten Star Earth Venerables.

"Not good!"

The expressions of the many earth venerables in the sky above the Huaxia Continent changed drastically, and their bodies seemed to be suppressed by this giant hand, and they couldn't move at all.

The space around them froze, and even with all their might, they couldn't resist.

The gap between the two sides is too big, and no matter how many ordinary Earth Venerables there are, they can't compete with the Ten Star Earth Venerables.

At the critical moment, a sword light slashed and directly killed the giant ape, and the monstrous giant hand also dissipated.

"Thank you, Ten Thousand Divine Generals!"

"Thank you, Ten Thousand Divine Generals!"

"Thank you, Ten Thousand Divine Generals!"

The Terran Dignitaries thanked each other.

In the territory of the human race, a large number of source beasts have impacted the starry sky continents, and the earth lords can't finish killing, and the masters of the human race and the gods of the universe have also taken action, turning the starry sky into battle fields everywhere, constantly fighting with the source beasts.

At the same time, many Terran powerhouses also entered those continent fragments, killing the source beasts while also collecting the resources on those continent fragments.

This battle has been staged for thousands of years, and some of the small races and middle races of the universe that were lucky enough to survive before have been completely wiped out in this turmoil.

......

Terran.

At this moment, almost half of the source beasts have been killed, and the rest are basically in a controllable range, and they are limited to those continental fragments, which can be used as a place of trial for the human race in the future.

The Terrans have suffered a lot of losses in this turmoil, and have lost a lot of Earth Lords and Lords, but on the whole, the strength of the Terrans has increased.

Because of the fighting and fighting, some geniuses of the human race have risen, and those continental fragments contain too many resources, and even have some elixirs that can improve their talents, so that the earth of the human race is constantly born.

In addition, the blood of the source beast can refine the flesh body, and now cultivators can cultivate the flesh body, so the source beast is full of treasures to the human race.

The blood of the source beast can be quenched, the source core can be used for cultivation, and the bone of the source beast can be used to refine weapons.

Therefore, the human race used the source beast to increase its strength too much.

Just like the Heavenly Pavilion, as the number one force of the human race today, there are already hundreds of Earth Venerables in the Heavenly Pavilion, and there are more than thousands, and there are tens of thousands of cosmic gods, what a terrifying statistic.

In other words, in the past, the strength of the entire human race together was not as good as the current Heavenly Pavilion.

It is worth mentioning that the human race gave birth to two ten-star earth venerables, namely the mixed yuan earth venerable and the kunwu earth venerable, they used the blood of countless source beasts plus a good body refining secret technique to exercise the physical body to the limit, plus the comprehension of the innate dao monument, so that their avenue has improved a lot, and their strength has jumped into the ten-star earth venerable level.

Of course, they have almost used up their foundation, and it is difficult for them to continue to improve, unless there is an amazing opportunity and an amazing inheritance.

The strength of the human race has skyrocketed, but the other forces have been unlucky, after all, the other forces do not have a strong person like Ye Tian.

For example, the gods and demons can be described as very miserable.

Although the first god lord and the first demon lord of the gods and demons clan have stepped into the level of the ten-star earth venerable, the gods and demons clan only have two ten-star earth lords, and the territory occupied by the gods and demons clan is too large, far beyond the human race, after all, it is the previous super clan, and it occupies the center of the universe, and the source beasts that appear in this position are extremely powerful.

A large number of earth-honor-level source beasts appeared in the gods and demons, even if the first god lord and the first demon lord killed the source beast with all their might, they still couldn't compete, and they were even restrained by a few top-notch source beasts.

Over the past few thousand years, although the source beast was defeated by the gods and demons because of the fighting, and had no wisdom and did not know how to cooperate, the losses of the gods and demons were too heavy, more than seventy percent of the people died, and nearly half of the earth lords fell, which still includes the number of new earth lords.

It can be said that the old Earth Venerable has almost fallen seventy or eighty percent, and the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord are also seriously injured.

In order to keep the gods and demons alive, the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord had no choice but to narrow down the scope of their territory and give up a large area of their territory.

And those territories were occupied by some source beasts, and became a forbidden area.

But the worst thing is the Ten Thousand Races Alliance, more than ninety percent of the races have been wiped out, the Earth Venerable has lost too much, and the Ten Thousand Races Alliance has been divided by the source beasts, and it is impossible to unite at all.

At this point, the alliance of all races has been broken and has become a small force, surviving in the cracks of the universe.

And the number of source beasts has naturally decreased by seven or eight percent, and the remaining source beasts are basically gathered in one place, forming a continent of source beasts, and the battle between the cultivators and the source beasts is naturally not over, but the large-scale war is gone, and only a small-scale battle remains.

The loss of the Eternal Universe was very miserable, but the loss of the Cangyu Universe was not bad at all.

The Cangyu Universe was originally stronger than the Eternal Universe, and the Origin Realm of the Cangyu Universe was naturally stronger, and the Source Beasts there even had existences comparable to those of the God General.

For thousands of years, several holy places in the Cangyu Universe have been destroyed.

But due to the endless killing, countless creatures fell, and their energy was integrated into the universe, accelerating the integration of the universe.

In addition, the Origin Realm is considered to be the last few layers of dimensional worlds, and soon the other layers of dimensional worlds also collapsed and merged into the main world, but fortunately, no other powerful creatures have descended.

At this point, all the dimensional worlds of the universe have been unified, expanding the area of the entire universe by tens of thousands of times, and a large area of the universe is empty, but there is no force to occupy it.

After all, the population of the universe has plummeted too much, and the universe has expanded tens of thousands of times, how can it occupy so much territory.

But it is conceivable that in the next period of time, the major forces will inevitably accelerate the birth of the population, and it will also be a period of rapid development.

During this period, except for the occasional cultivation, Ye Tian spent the rest of his time wandering around, constantly copying fusion talents, and constantly looking for physical body talents, even if he couldn't find super god-level physical talents, he had to copy some god-level physical talents, looking forward to one day being able to give birth to super-god-level physical talents.

In a flash, 50,000 years have passed.

The originally empty universe is now initially prosperous, the population of the human race has increased dozens of times, and the strength of the human race has also grown rapidly, and the earth lord has been born.

In the past, it took a long time for the Terrans to give birth to an Earth Lord, but now it is very common.

And the ten stars of the human race are not just one digit, but two digits.

As for how strong Ye Tian is now, no one knows except himself.
